name: Snipe-IT
description: Open-source IT asset management platform. Verifies hardware asset inventory, user access, and software license tracking in Snipe-IT.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Snipe-IT instance as an admin
2. Go to Admin > User Management
3. Select your user account
4. Click 'Manage API Keys'
5. Create a new personal access token
6. Copy the token and enter it below along with your instance URL

credentialFields.label: Snipe-IT Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Snipe-IT instance URL, e.g. https://assets.yourcompany.com

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Go to your Snipe-IT instance > Admin > User Management > select your user > Manage API Keys > Create New Token

checks.name: Snipe-IT App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the Snipe-IT instance is accessible and the API token is valid by retrieving instance status.

checks.name: Snipe-IT Asset Inventory
checks.description: Reviews the hardware asset inventory in Snipe-IT, verifying that assets are tracked and properly categorized.

checks.name: Snipe-IT Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews user accounts in Snipe-IT to verify employee access control and user management.

checks.name: Snipe-IT License Tracking
checks.description: Reviews software license tracking in Snipe-IT to verify license compliance and utilization.
